# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent supply chain security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "example/project",
    "description": "Example project with secure post-install scripts",
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Running post-install setup...\\n';\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('config/.env')) { copy('config/.env.example', 'config/.env'); echo 'Created .env file\\n'; }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('storage/logs')) { mkdir('storage/logs', 0755, true); echo 'Created logs directory\\n'; }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('public/assets')) { mkdir('public/assets', 0755, true); echo 'Created assets directory\\n'; }\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Downloading assets...\\n';\"",
            "@php -r \"if (function_exists('curl_init')) { $ch = curl_init(); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, 'https://example.com/assets.zip'); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, true); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, true); $data = curl_exec($ch); curl_close($ch); file_put_contents('temp/assets.zip', $data); echo 'Downloaded assets.zip\\n'; } else { echo 'cURL not available\\n'; }\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Running PHP setup script...\\n';\"",
            "@php -f \"scripts/setup.php\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Post-install setup complete\\n';\""
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Running post-update setup...\\n';\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Checking for updates...\\n';\"",
            "@php -f \"scripts/update.php\"",
            "@php -r \"echo 'Post-update setup complete\\n';\""
        ]
    },
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.0",
        "ext-curl": "*",
        "ext-json": "*"
    },
    "config": {
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/installers": true
        }
    }
}
